canonical_definition: The ability to comprehend videos at a fine-grained level by identifying, localizing, and describing individual events, as opposed to providing a single summary for the entire video.
papers: E.T. Bench: Towards Open-Ended Event-Level Video-Language Understanding
Synatra: Turning Indirect Knowledge into Direct Demonstrations for Digital Agents at Scale
